description_long: This is a wooden entertainment cabinet with a curved front and two side compartments, topped by a flat-screen television. The cabinet features a central open shelf and a lower drawer, both of which are accessible from the front. On top of the cabinet, there are several items including a blue kettle, a teapot, and a pair of brown boots placed on the floor in front. To the right side, a set of golf clubs in a bag and a green putter are leaning against the cabinet. The cabinet stands on four short, rounded legs and has a natural wood grain finish. The back of the cabinet is plain, and the overall setup suggests it could be found in a garage, recreation room, or urban living space.
description: A wooden entertainment cabinet with a TV on top, side compartments, a central shelf, and a lower drawer, surrounded by various household and sports items.
description_view_0: Front view showing the TV, blue kettle, teapot, boots, golf clubs, and the cabinet's open shelf and drawer.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the TV, the depth of the cabinet, and the golf clubs leaning against the side.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing the flat surfaces of the TV and cabinet, with items arranged on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the cabinet, the TV's rear, and the boots on the floor.
